zh.Buckenham Priory, Buckenham, Norfolk, En: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴肯哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Cromwell於1357年出生在英國林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾時，她的父親Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell19歲，母親Maud de Bernanke20歲。她於大約1372年與John de Clifton在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1391年9月24日在英國享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Cromwell于1357年出生在英国林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell19岁，母亲Maud de Bernanke20岁。她于大约1372年与John de Clifton在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1391年9月24日在英国享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Cromwell was born in 1357, in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, was 19 and her mother, Maud de Bernanke, was 20. She married John de Clifton about 1372, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 24 September 1391, in England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Cromwell est née en 1357, à Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Maud de Bernanke, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John de Clifton environ 1372, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 24 septembre 1391, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Cromwell 1357 in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell 19 und ihre Mutter Maud de Bernanke 20. Sie hat um 1372 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England John de Clifton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 24. September 1391 im Alter von 34 Jahren in England und wurde in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Cromwell è nata il nel 1357 nel Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Maud de Bernanke, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John de Clifton circa 1372, nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 24 settembre 1391, nel England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Buckenham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Buckenham Priory, Buckenham, Norfolk, En: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハム
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cromwellが1357年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールンカストルで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwellは19歳，母Maud de Bernankeは20歳であった。約1372年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルでJohn de Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1391年9月24日にイギリスで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cromwell(이)가 1357년 영국 링코실르 호른카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Bernanke(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1372년 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 John de Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 9월 24일 영국에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 벅함에 묻혔다.

mn.Buckenham Priory, Buckenham, Norfolk, En: Buckenham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Cromwell nasceu em 1357, em Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Bernanke, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Clifton aproximadamente 1372, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1391, em Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Cromwell родилась в 1357 г. в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Bernanke, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Clifton около 1372 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 24 сентября 1391 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Cromwell nació en 1357, en Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Maud de Bernanke, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John de Clifton aproximadamente 1372, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1391, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
